upload_widget.title: Uploading Profile Picture...
upload_widget.description: Please wait while we process your image

profile.title: Profile Information
profile.upload_description: Upload a new profile picture. Click on your photo or the upload button to choose an image.
profile.remove_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove your profile picture?
profile.remove_error: Failed to remove avatar. Please try again.
profile.file_read_error: Error reading the selected file. Please try again.

language.title: Language Preference
language.none: No language preference set. Defaulting to English.
language.update_error: Failed to update language preference. Please try again.

timezone.title: Timezone
timezone.update_error: Failed to update timezone. Please try again.

email_verification.title: Email Verification
email_verification.verify_prompt: Please verify your email address to use all features

add_email.title: Add an Email Address
add_email.description: Adding an email address makes your account more recoverable. You can use it for password resets and account recovery.

mfa.inactive_description: Enable 2FA to add extra security to your account
mfa.title: Two-Factor Authentication
mfa.disabled_text: Add extra security to your account
mfa.already_enabled_message: Two-factor authentication is already enabled for your account.
mfa.method_already_enabled: This MFA method is already enabled.
mfa.not_enabled_message: Two-factor authentication is not enabled for your account.
mfa.disable_confirm: Are you sure you want to disable two-factor authentication? This will make your account less secure.

password.set_description: You currently only have social login enabled. Set a password to ensure you can always access your account, even if you unlink your social accounts.

recovery.title: Account Recovery
recovery.active_description: You have backup methods set up to help you get back into your account
recovery.inactive_title: Account Recovery is Not Set Up
recovery.inactive_description: Set up backup methods to help you get back into your account if you lose your password or 2FA device

dashboard.score_critical: No recovery methods configured. Set up at least one method to protect your account.
dashboard.score_warning: Only one recovery method configured. Add more for better protection.
dashboard.score_low_codes: Backup codes running low. Generate new codes soon.
dashboard.score_good: Your account recovery options are well configured.

backup_codes.title: Backup Codes
backup_codes.not_setup_text: Create one-time codes to get back into your account
backup_codes.confirm_new: Are you sure you want to create new backup codes? This will make all current codes unusable.
backup_codes.confirm_remove: Are you sure you want to remove backup codes?
backup_codes.view_once_tooltip: Backup codes can only be viewed once for security

backup_email.title: Backup Email
backup_email.verified_text: Can be used to get back into your account
backup_email.pending_text: Check your email for verification link
backup_email.not_setup_text: Add a backup email to get back into your account
backup_email.confirm_remove: Are you sure you want to remove the backup email?
backup_email.cancel_confirm: Are you sure you want to cancel the pending email verification?

security_questions.title: Security Questions
security_questions.not_setup_text: Add security questions to help recover your account
security_questions.confirm_remove: Are you sure you want to remove your security questions?

social.title: Connected Accounts
social.description: Connect your social accounts for quick and secure sign-in. You can connect multiple accounts and manage them from here.
social.set_password_first_tooltip: You must set a password before disconnecting your only social account
social.confirm_unlink: Are you sure you want to unlink your {{provider}} account?

notifications.title: Notification Preferences
notifications.preferred_channel_desc: Choose how you want to receive notifications
notifications.security_alerts_desc: Get notified about suspicious login attempts and security events
notifications.new_session_alerts_desc: Get notified when a new device signs in to your account
notifications.marketing_desc: Receive updates about new features and improvements
